title: cyclosorus guadalupensis
intro: Cyclosorus guadalupensis, also known as the Guadalupe leather fern, is a species of fern native to the Gulf Coast region of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus guadalupensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
